title: Pleasing Umami Vietnamese Noodles
description: A vegetarian-friendly Vietnamese dish featuring vermicelli rice noodles and a cheesy, umami sauce, this crowd-pleaser is sure to delight. With a delicious cheese-pull and savory flavors, it's perfect for any occasion.
instructions: Cook the vermicelli rice noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion to the skillet and saute until it's translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the sliced mushrooms to the skillet and continue to saute until they're tender and lightly browned.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce and fish sauce.
Pour the sauce into the skillet and stir to combine with the onion and mushrooms.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the sauce and vegetables.
Transfer the noodle mixture to a serving dish and top with the shredded mozzarella cheese.
Place the dish under the broiler and cook until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the dish from the oven and top with the fresh bean sprouts.
